options.name: <object_list>
options.description: Resets the annotated checks on specified list or collection of cell instances

options.name: -all
options.description: Resets all annotated timing check values in the design

options.name: -clock
options.description: Direction of the related pin of the check to reset

options.name: -fall
options.description: Restricts the reset to only affect the falling edge of the constrained pins

options.name: -from
options.description: Beginning instance pin of the timing arcs for which the annotated check is reset

options.name: -hold
options.description: Resets annotations on the hold check type

options.name: -nochange_high
options.description: Resets the annotations on the high timing check type

options.name: -nochange_low
options.description: Resets the annotations on the low timing check type

options.name: -recovery
options.description: Resets annotations on the recovery check type

options.name: -removal
options.description: Resets annotations on the removal check type

options.name: -rise
options.description: Restricts the reset to only affect the rising edge of the constrained pins

options.name: -setup
options.description: Resets annotations on the setup check type

options.name: -to
options.description: Terminating instance pin of the timing arcs for which the annotated check is reset
